steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: After the blank: a noun phrase “the largest island of them all: Manitoulin Island” preceded by preposition “to”.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: A preposition must attach directly to its object with no intervening punctuation; choice C does this. Choices A, B, and D insert punctuation that violates this rule. That matches choice C — C is correct.
